name: AXA UAP ADR 1/EO 2,29
summary: AXA UAP ADR 1/EO 2,29 refers to the American Depositary Receipt (ADR) of AXA S.A., a multinational insurance company headquartered in Paris, France. The ADR represents ownership of a certain number of AXA shares held by a depositary bank. AXA provides insurance, investment management, and other financial services globally.
